Package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element

Class LabeledRect<T extends LabeledRect<T>>

java.lang.Object
net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Keyed
net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element.AbstractElement<Rect<LabeledRect<T>>>
net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element.Rect<LabeledRect<T>>
net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element.LabeledRect<T>
Type Parameters:
T - Type of labeled rectangle element
All Implemented Interfaces:
Element, JsonSerializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Button, Checkbox, Radio, Slider
public abstract class LabeledRect<T extends LabeledRect<T>> extends Rect<LabeledRect<T>>
Represents a labeled rectangle element with an optional tooltip.

  • Method Details

    • getLabel

      @Nullable public net.kyori.adventure.text.Component getLabel()
      Get the text label.

      If null, default empty label will be used.

      Returns:
      Text label

      @NotNull public T setLabel(@Nullable String label)
      Set the text label.

      If null, default empty label will be used.

      Parameters:
      label - Text label to set

      Parameters:
      label - Text label to set
      Returns:
      This element

    • getTooltip

      @Nullable public net.kyori.adventure.text.Component getTooltip()
      Get the text for hover tooltip.

      If null, no tooltip will be used.

      Returns:
      Tooltip text

    • setTooltip

      Set the text for hover tooltip.
